["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Entware 使用 opkg 来管理其软件包，只需修改 opkg 配置文件中的软件源地址，就可以使用镜像来下载软件包。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["按照官方 Wiki 中的教程安装好 entware 后，使用 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"sed"}]," 命令即可将软件源地址替换为本镜像站。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["替换后，请运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"opkg update"}]," 命令，更新软件包 feed。"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["如果系统没有 sed 命令，可以手动编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/opt/etc/opkg.conf"}]," 文件，编辑时请注意自己设备的处理器架构。
例如："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("sed -i 's|https\\?://bin.entware.net|");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("|g' /opt/etc/opkg.conf");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("opkg update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("src/gz entware ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/aarch64-k3.10");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
